problem id: 790e0153
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHR(4)

examples:
  11010110 -> 11111010
  01110100 -> 11111110
  01000111 -> 11111011
  01100100 -> 11111101
  00100101 -> 11111101
  10100111 -> 11100101
  11101011 -> 11101101
  01101101 -> 11111101

query: 11000111
predicted answer: 11101011
